The '''Whaladon Processing Center''' was located on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

==History==
Since [[Whaladon/Legends|Whaladons]] were sentient beings, hunting them had been outlawed for centuries until it was legalized under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The processing center was an installation run by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dunwell]] and manned by [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] laborers for hunting Whaladons for their meat and blubber. Afterwards, the meat was sent to the [[Whaladon Meat Quality Control Division]].

The Center used [[antimatter furnace]]s to power [[whirlpool generator]]s to capture the Whaladons.

Dunwell aided the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Trioculus]] in his search for the [[Glove of Darth Vader|glove of]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' {{1st}}
